# logtail_dashboard_chart (Data Source)

This data source allows you to get information about a Chart in a Dashboard in Better Stack Telemetry.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "logtail_dashboard_chart" "request_rate" {
  dashboard_id = "123"
  name         = "Request Rate"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `dashboard_id` (String) The ID of the dashboard this chart belongs to.
- `name` (String) The name of this chart.

### Read-Only

- `chart_type` (String) The type of chart (e.g., 'line_chart', 'bar_chart', 'pie_chart', 'number_chart', 'table_chart', 'tail_chart', 'static_text_chart', 'scatter_chart', 'gauge_chart', 'heatmap_chart', 'map_chart', 'text_chart', 'funnel_chart', 'anomalies_chart').
- `created_at` (String) The time when this chart was created.
- `description` (String) The description of this chart.
- `h` (Number) The height of this chart in grid units.
- `id` (String) The ID of this chart.
- `query` (List of Object) The queries for this chart. At least one query is required. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--query))
- `settings` (String) Chart settings as a JSON string. Settings vary by chart type and include options like unit, decimal_places, legend, stacking, etc.
- `updated_at` (String) The time when this chart was updated.
- `w` (Number) The width of this chart in grid units (1-12).
- `x` (Number) The horizontal position of this chart in the dashboard grid (0-11).
- `y` (Number) The vertical position of this chart in the dashboard grid.

<a id="nestedatt--query"></a>
### Nested Schema for `query`

Read-Only:

- `id` (Number)
- `name` (String)
- `query_type` (String)
- `source_variable` (String)
- `sql_query` (String)
- `static_text` (String)
- `where_condition` (String)
